title: mentha longifolia var. calliantha
intro: Mentha longifolia var. calliantha, also known as woolly mint, is a variety of the mint plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and calm the nervous system. The health benefits of woolly mint include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as a natural remedy for headaches and colds. Woolly mint can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to make topical creams, salves, and balms to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
